name: IgDesign
description: In-vitro validated tool to redesign antibody CDRs in complex with antigens for improved binding affinity. Experimentally validated for binding against 8 targets, resulting in ~10-20% improved binders.
capabilities: In-vitro validated tool to redesign antibody CDRs in complex with antigens for improved binding affinity
Experimentally validated for binding against 8 targets, resulting in ~10-20% improved binders

pdbFile.description: Antibody-antigen complex structure in PDB format

heavyChainId.description: Chain ID of the antibody heavy chain

lightChainId.description: Chain ID of the antibody light chain

antigenChainId.description: Chain ID of the antigen chain

numBatches.description: Number of batches to process, each generating 1000 sequences

verifySequences.description: Automatically submit output sequences to structure prediction for verification

customCdrIndices.description: Select custom indices for each CDR instead of auto-detecting IMGT numbered CDRs
